name: cmcc-cloud-alive
description: Protocol-level keepalive research and implementation for China Mobile Cloud PC.

scripts.check: node --check bin/cmcc-cloud-alive.js && node --check scripts/analyze-cag-transport.js && node --check scripts/analyze-loopback-spice.js && node --check scripts/extract-cag-handshake.js && node --check scripts/verify-http-heartbeat.js && node --check lib/family-api.js && node --check lib/protocol/cag-handshake-plan.js && node --check lib/protocol/zte-cag.js && node --check lib/protocol/spice.js && node --check lib/protocol/local-spice.js
scripts.test: npm run check && node tests/protocol-codec.test.js && node tests/family-api.test.js
